title: thelypteris baramensis
intro: Thelypteris baramensis, also known as Borneo shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris baramensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Thelypteris baramensis can be made into a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
